servers.name: Authorization Server

tools.name: authz_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluates whether a given role is permitted to invoke a specific tool

tools.name: authz_issue_token
tools.description: Issues a scoped, time-limited token with SHA-256 hashing

tools.name: authz_validate_token
tools.description: Validates a token's authenticity and expiration

tools.name: authz_revoke_token
tools.description: Revokes a previously issued token

tools.name: authz_list_policies
tools.description: Lists active policies for a given role or server

servers.primaryFunction: Deny-by-default RBAC, SHA-256 token lifecycle, policy evaluation

servers.name: FHIR Clinical Data Server

tools.name: fhir_read
tools.description: Read a single FHIR R4 resource by type and ID

tools.name: fhir_search
tools.description: Search FHIR resources with parameter filtering

tools.name: fhir_patient_lookup
tools.description: Look up a patient by pseudonymized identifier

tools.name: fhir_study_status
tools.description: Retrieve the status of a clinical study

servers.primaryFunction: FHIR R4 clinical data with HIPAA Safe Harbor de-identification

tools.name: dicom_query
tools.description: Search imaging studies by patient or accession number

tools.name: dicom_retrieve_pointer
tools.description: Obtain secure references without transferring pixel data

tools.name: dicom_study_metadata
tools.description: Retrieve study-level DICOM metadata

tools.name: dicom_recist_measurements
tools.description: Query tumor measurement data for treatment response

tools.name: ledger_append
tools.description: Append a new record to the hash-chained audit trail

tools.name: ledger_verify
tools.description: Verify the integrity of the entire audit chain

tools.name: ledger_query
tools.description: Query audit records with filters

tools.name: ledger_replay
tools.description: Replay a sequence of audit records

tools.name: ledger_export
tools.description: Export the full audit chain in specified format

tools.name: provenance_record
tools.description: Record a provenance entry in the DAG

tools.name: provenance_query_forward
tools.description: Query downstream data lineage

tools.name: provenance_query_backward
tools.description: Query upstream data lineage

tools.name: provenance_fingerprint
tools.description: Compute a SHA-256 fingerprint for data

tools.name: provenance_lineage
tools.description: Retrieve the full lineage graph for a source

simulationNote: Server metadata is derived from the repository specification. No live MCP server instances are running.
